body:
## Implementation plan ready — BIN-96

Reviewed codebase, Design brief, and Market Research approval. Plan covers:

- **13 new files**:  type, localStorage CRUD lib, SubmissionTracker + Board + Timeline + Card + Panel + OverdueChip + KpiStrip components (all CSS modules, grayscale tokens only)
- **3 modified files**:  (add  mode),  (add submissions branch),  (add )
- No drag-drop in v1 (per Design feasibility note)
- localStorage key: , consistent with scenes pattern
- Overdue detection: ISO date comparison, timezone-safe
- Acceptance criteria fully mapped in plan

[BIN-96](/BIN/issues/BIN-96)

Assign to: Code Monkey
Recovery ticket; previous issue stuck (checkout 409) and cancelled. Previous: BIN-89.
